title: papaver nivale
intro: Papaver nivale, also known as Alpine Poppy, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Papaveraceae family, characterized by its delicate white or pink flowers and slender foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Papaver nivale include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reduce inflammation, and aid in the removal of mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
